strategy: Hit with Storm, Life, or Death (+5%); avoid Myth (65%) and Balance (70%).
His Earthquake at end of round 1 (and round 5) strips one positive charm and one ward from everyone — don't stack blades before round 1's quake; build after it.
Set up rounds 2-4 and land your hit before the round-5 Earthquake wipes your blades again.
Watch the delayed Balance bomb from round 3: 1,000 damage that lands three rounds later — shield for it.
Blade after the quake and burst him with a Storm/Life/Death hit.
cheatNotes: Late wizards eat his Shadow natural attack — join on time.
End of round 1 and round 5 he Earthquakes, removing a positive charm and ward from everyone — build blades after each quake.
Starting round 3 he casts a delayed Balance spell that hits for 1,000 three rounds later — shield for it.
His Earthquake deals 145 Myth and strips one charm and one ward.
His Shadow natural attack triggers an Immolate that strips a charm and a ward.
